headings.h1: font-display text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-wide leading-none uppercase
headings.h2: font-display text-3xl sm:text-4xl tracking-wide leading-tight uppercase

layout.shadows: None or minimal dark ambient shadow. ABSOLUTELY NO GLASSMORPHISM or blur effects.
layout.spacing_strategy: Control Room Grid (Dense, structural, highly aligned bento-style grids. 1px borders between widgets rather than padded cards where possible.)

buttons.primary: bg-[#CC1F1F] hover:bg-[#FF2B2B] text-white rounded-none font-display uppercase tracking-widest px-6 py-2 transition-colors duration-200
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#2A2A2A] hover:border-[#CC1F1F] hover:text-[#CC1F1F] text-white rounded-none font-body text-sm px-4 py-2 transition-colors duration-200

cards.base: bg-[#111111] border border-[#2A2A2A] rounded-none p-4 lg:p-6

inputs.base: bg-[#1A1A1A] border border-[#2A2A2A] text-white rounded-none font-body text-sm focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#CC1F1F] focus:border-[#CC1F1F] focus:outline-none px-3 py-2 transition-colors placeholder:text-[#666666]

badges_tags.base: px-2 py-1 bg-[#1A1A1A] border border-[#2A2A2A] rounded-none font-body text-xs uppercase text-white

kanban_board.column: bg-[#0A0A0A] border-r border-[#2A2A2A] min-h-[calc(100vh-64px)] p-4 flex flex-col gap-4
kanban_board.task_card: bg-[#111111] border border-[#2A2A2A] p-3 cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing hover:border-[#888888] transition-colors rounded-none shadow-none

loading.style: Skeleton screens using flat blocks (animate-pulse bg-[#1A1A1A] rounded-none). NEVER use spinners.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Crisp and instant. Accent colors illuminate bright red on hover. Links/Icons turn from #888888 to #FFFFFF.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use short durations (150ms-200ms) for color changes. Layout/transform changes (like card tilt) use 300ms ease-out.
motion_and_interactions.focus_states: All focusable elements must have focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#CC1F1F] focus:ring-offset-1 focus:ring-offset-[#0A0A0A].

accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive/key elements MUST have data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based, e.g., data-testid='submit-task-button').
accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG standards. Do not use #666666 text on #111111 background for critical information (use #888888 minimum, or white).

media_and_icons.icon_library: lucide-react (using sharp/angular variants where possible) or @phosphor-icons/react (regular/bold weight for technical feel)

login_hero_background.description: Cinematic, moody dark broadcast control room background with abstract red/black glowing data streams. Use in the /login page.

instructions_to_main_agent.framework: Next.js 14 App Router, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui
instructions_to_main_agent.shadcn_overrides: You MUST override all shadcn default border radii to `rounded-none`. Override default popover/dialog backgrounds to `#111111` or `#1A1A1A` with border `#2A2A2A`.
instructions_to_main_agent.tailwind_config: Extend fontFamily with display: ['"Bebas Neue"', 'sans-serif'] and body: ['"IBM Plex Mono"', 'monospace']. Extend colors manually matching the guidelines.
instructions_to_main_agent.specific_requirements: Currency must be formatted as TZS. Timezone logic must use Africa/Nairobi. Skeletons for loaders, NO spinners. Kanban board requires 0px borders and strict #2A2A2A lines between columns. All components must look like an elite broadcast dashboard.
